description: Research long-term engagement and social accountability mechanics

keyPrinciples: Fine-tuning reward structure makes or breaks long-term engagement
Free users should still get real value
Monetization should support goals, not exploit them

whatWorks: Battling enemies by completing real-life tasks
habitica.keyInsight: Social element adds accountability - party members' health/XP impacted by each other
habitica.caution: Habitica removed Tavern and guilds in 2023 - social features can be removed

nextStep: Research currency/shop systems and milestone reward mechanics
